payload.title: Advertise mTLS capability + CA fingerprint in Bonjour TXT
payload.description:
Once mTLS is live, update the _scope._tcp TXT record to advertise `auth=bearer,mtls` and include the CA SHA-256 fingerprint as `ca_fp=<hex>`. Native clients can use ca_fp to pin the CA when first discovering a Scope on the network (prevents a malicious LAN peer from spoofing scope.local).

Acceptance:
- `dns-sd -L scope _scope._tcp local` shows the new TXT keys
- ca_fp matches `scope ca fingerprint`
- SwiftUI client (future) can use ca_fp to validate the server's leaf before pairing

Depends on the CA, HTTPS, and mTLS stories.
